app.title: TravelXplore
main.countryHint: Narrows the mystery destination; leave as Any Country for worldwide rotation.
main.cityHint: Optional: pick a city or leave Anywhere for the whole country.
main.errorNights: Stay must be at least one night.
main.errorCountries: Could not load countries. Try again later.
main.errorCities: Could not load cities for this country.
booking.noRooms: No rooms available within your budget
booking.noRoomsHint: Try raising your budget or choosing different dates from the home search, then open this page again.
booking.chooseRoom: Choose a room to see your total
about.heroSubtitle: We believe the best journeys begin when you let go of control.
about.storyP1:
TravelXplore was created to challenge the way we travel.
Instead of endless searching, comparing, and overthinking —
we offer something different.
about.storyP2:
A moment of uncertainty.
A sense of anticipation.
A journey chosen for you.
about.storyP3: Because sometimes, the best destinations are the ones you never planned.
about.missionBody: To turn travel into an experience of discovery, not just a transaction.
about.step1Body: Budget, dates, guests, country — and the vibe that calls to you.
about.step2Title: Let the system select a destination
about.step2Body: We search real availability and hand you a single, serendipitous match.
about.step3Body: Secure checkout with trusted providers. Your trip becomes real in moments.
about.trustBody: All hotels and availability come from trusted travel providers. Every booking is real, secure, and instantly confirmed.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We’re here to help with your journey.
contact.formSubtitle: Questions, issues, or support — we read every note.
contact.successBody: Thank you. Our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.placeholderMessage: Tell us how we can help…
contact.supportNote: For booking-related questions, please include your booking reference. Our team will respond as quickly as possible.
contact.errMessageShort: Please write at least 10 characters so we can help.
auth.signIn.title: Sign in and start saving
auth.signIn.subtitle: Manage your bookings with ease and enjoy member-only benefits
auth.signIn.verifyFirst: Please verify your email before logging in.
auth.signIn.resendNotice: If an account exists, we sent a new verification link.
auth.forgot.title: Forgot password
auth.forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgot.successBody: If an account exists for that address, we sent password reset instructions. The link expires in one hour.
auth.forgot.errRateLimit: Too many requests. Try again later.
auth.forgot.errServerGeneric: Could not process request. Try again later.
auth.reset.title: Set a new password
auth.reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password you haven’t used here before.
auth.reset.successBody: You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.reset.errToken: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
auth.reset.errPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.reset.errServerGeneric: Could not reset password. Try again later.
auth.signUp.title: Welcome to TravelXplore
auth.signUp.subtitle: Let’s get to know you — please fill in your account details
auth.signUp.checkEmailBody: We’ve sent you a verification link. Please confirm your email to activate your account.
auth.signUp.errPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
myBookings.subtitle: View and search your reservations.
myBookings.searchPlaceholder: Search by hotel name or booking ID…
myBookings.emptyHint: When you complete a stay, it will appear here.
